shared_attributes.position: center of 128x128 screen, on perch at y=60
shared_attributes.key_features: crest, cheek patch, tail - 3 essential cockatiel traits

context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel game
context.role: Triggered when food bowl is empty (food_level = 0)
context.screen_position: Center (x=64, y=60), on perch, looking toward food bowl at (16, 100)
context.usage_scenario: Indicates Echo needs food. Head oriented toward empty food bowl. Remains until player taps food bowl to refill. Status bubble appears with seed icon.

visual_specification.shape: Cockatiel with head turned toward food bowl, expectant posture
visual_specification.texture: Flat pixel art with hand-drawn organic edges, no gradients

animation.description: Frame 1: Head turned toward food bowl. Frame 2: Head tilts slightly. Frame 3: Head returns to bowl direction. Frame 4: Slight body lean toward bowl. Anticipatory motion.

visual_specification.details: Head: rotated approximately 30 degrees toward left (food bowl direction). Eyes: wide open, focused on bowl. Crest: normal position, may have slight sideways tilt. Body: subtle lean (1-2px) toward food bowl side. Beak: closed. Status bubble (12x10px) appears above-right with seed icon (3x3px #FFA300) inside.

relationships.shared_with: Same base body as all Echo states
relationships.differences_from: echo_eating: looking at bowl vs actively eating. echo_idle: head turned vs forward. Status bubble only appears in this state (and sleeping).

explicit_negations: Stomach does not growl or show rumble lines
Body does not shrink or look thinner
No thought bubble with food (only status bubble with icon)
Does not leave perch to approach bowl
